title: quercus liaoi
intro: Quercus liaoi is a species of oak tree native to Yunnan province in China, belonging to the family Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus liaoi include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its bark and leaves are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
